add-backlog.description: Add an idea to the backlog parking lot (999.x numbering)

add-phase.description: Add phase to end of current milestone in roadmap

add-tests.description: Generate tests for a completed phase based on UAT criteria and implementation

add-todo.description: Capture idea or task as todo from current conversation context

audit-milestone.description: Audit milestone completion against original intent before archiving

audit-uat.description: Cross-phase audit of all outstanding UAT and verification items

autonomous.description: Run all remaining phases autonomously — discuss→plan→execute per phase

check-todos.description: List pending todos and select one to work on

cleanup.description: Archive accumulated phase directories from completed milestones

complete-milestone.description: Archive completed milestone and prepare for next version

debug.description: Systematic debugging with persistent state across context resets

discuss-phase.description: Gather phase context through adaptive questioning before planning. Use --auto to skip interactive questions (Antigravity picks recommended defaults).

do.description: Route freeform text to the right GSD command automatically

execute-phase.description: Execute all plans in a phase with wave-based parallelization

fast.description: Execute a trivial task inline — no subagents, no planning overhead

forensics.description: Post-mortem investigation for failed GSD workflows — analyzes git history, artifacts, and state to diagnose what went wrong

health.description: Diagnose planning directory health and optionally repair issues

help.description: Show available GSD commands and usage guide

insert-phase.description: Insert urgent work as decimal phase (e.g., 72.1) between existing phases

list-phase-assumptions.description: Surface Antigravity's assumptions about a phase approach before planning

list-workspaces.description: List active GSD workspaces and their status

manager.description: Interactive command center for managing multiple phases from one terminal

map-codebase.description: Analyze codebase with parallel mapper agents to produce .planning/codebase/ documents

milestone-summary.description: Generate a comprehensive project summary from milestone artifacts for team onboarding and review

new-milestone.description: Start a new milestone cycle — update PROJECT.md and route to requirements

new-project.description: Initialize a new project with deep context gathering and PROJECT.md

new-workspace.description: Create an isolated workspace with repo copies and independent .planning/

next.description: Automatically advance to the next logical step in the GSD workflow

note.description: Zero-friction idea capture. Append, list, or promote notes to todos.

pause-work.description: Create context handoff when pausing work mid-phase

plan-milestone-gaps.description: Create phases to close all gaps identified by milestone audit

plan-phase.description: Create detailed phase plan (PLAN.md) with verification loop

plant-seed.description: Capture a forward-looking idea with trigger conditions — surfaces automatically at the right milestone

pr-branch.description: Create a clean PR branch by filtering out .planning/ commits — ready for code review

profile-user.description: Generate developer behavioral profile and create Antigravity-discoverable artifacts

progress.description: Calculate and render project completion percentage.

quick.description: Execute a quick task with GSD guarantees (atomic commits, state tracking) but skip optional agents

reapply-patches.description: Reapply local modifications after a GSD update

remove-phase.description: Remove a future phase from roadmap and renumber subsequent phases

remove-workspace.description: Remove a GSD workspace and clean up worktrees

research-phase.description: Research how to implement a phase (standalone - usually use /gsd:plan-phase instead)

resume-work.description: Resume work from previous session with full context restoration

review-backlog.description: Review and promote backlog items to active milestone

review.description: Request cross-AI peer review of phase plans from external AI CLIs

session-report.description: Generate a session report with token usage estimates, work summary, and outcomes

set-profile.description: Switch model profile for GSD agents (quality/balanced/budget/inherit)

settings.description: Configure GSD workflow toggles and model profile

ship.description: Create PR, run review, and prepare for merge after verification passes

stats.description: Display project statistics — phases, plans, requirements, git metrics, and timeline

thread.description: Manage persistent context threads for cross-session work

ui-phase.description: Generate UI design contract (UI-SPEC.md) for frontend phases

ui-review.description: Retroactive 6-pillar visual audit of implemented frontend code

update.description: Update GSD to latest version with changelog display

validate-phase.description: Retroactively audit and fill Nyquist validation gaps for a completed phase

verify-work.description: Validate built features through conversational UAT

workstreams.description: Manage parallel workstreams — list, create, switch, status, progress, complete, and resume

state.description: Manage and query project state memory.

subcommands.json: Output full state as raw JSON.
subcommands.update: Update a state key. usage: state update <key> <value>
subcommands.get: Retrieve a specific state value. usage: state get <key>
subcommands.patch: Apply multiple state changes via flags.
subcommands.advance-plan: Advance to the next plan in the current phase.
subcommands.update-progress: Sync STATE.md progress with ROADMAP.md status.
subcommands.add-decision: Record a design decision with rationale.

roadmap.description: Manage and analyze project roadmap and phases.

subcommands.get-phase: Retrieve details for a specific phase number.
subcommands.analyze: Analyze roadmap completion and next steps.
subcommands.update-plan-progress: Update completion status for a plan in ROADMAP.md.

find-phase.description: Search for a phase directory by number or name. usage: find-phase <query>

resolve-model.description: Resolve the optimal AI model for a specific agent type. usage: resolve-model <agent-type>

commit.description: Create a standardized GSD commit. usage: commit [message] --files [file1...]

subcommands.--amend: Amend the last commit instead of creating a new one.

verify-summary.description: Verify that a SUMMARY.md matches the corresponding PLAN.md. usage: verify-summary <path>

generate-slug.description: Convert a string into a URL-friendly slug. usage: generate-slug <text>

current-timestamp.description: Output the current timestamp in various formats. usage: current-timestamp [format]

list-todos.description: List all pending todos in the project. usage: list-todos [area]

verify-path-exists.description: Check if a specific path exists within the project. usage: verify-path-exists <path>

history-digest.description: Generate a concise digest of recent project activity.

todo.description: Atomic operations on a single todo file.

subcommands.complete: Mark a todo as done. usage: todo complete <path>

scaffold.description: Scaffold new project structures or phase directories. usage: scaffold <type> --name <name>

phase-plan-index.description: Sync and re-index plans within a phase directory.

state-snapshot.description: Create a persistent snapshot of the current project state.

summary-extract.description: Extract specific fields from a SUMMARY.md file. usage: summary-extract <path> --fields <f1,f2>

websearch.description: Perform a low-latency web search for technical info. usage: websearch <query>

phase.description: Atomic phase operations in the roadmap.

subcommands.next-decimal: Calculate the next available decimal phase for insertion.
subcommands.add: Add a new phase at the end of the milestone.
subcommands.insert: Insert a new decimal phase at a specific position.
subcommands.remove: Remove a phase and re-number subsequent phases.
subcommands.complete: Mark a phase as 100% complete in ROADMAP.md.

subcommands.plan-structure: Validate PLAN.md formatting and required sections.
subcommands.phase-completeness: Verify that all plans in a phase have summaries.
subcommands.references: Check for broken internal or artifact references.
subcommands.commits: Verify that git commits match planned work.
subcommands.artifacts: Confirm existence of required phase artifacts.
subcommands.key-links: Validate critical links and external references.
subcommands.consistency: Ensure ROADMAP.md, STATE.md and REQUIREMENTS.md are in sync.
subcommands.health: Check directory structure and general project health.

template.description: Manage and fill GSD artifact templates.

subcommands.select: Suggest the best template for a specific task.
subcommands.fill: Generate artifact content from a template with variables.

subcommands.get: Retrieve a value from frontmatter. usage: frontmatter get <file> --field <key>
subcommands.set: Update a frontmatter field. usage: frontmatter set <file> --field <key> --value <val>
subcommands.merge: Merge a JSON object into file frontmatter.
subcommands.validate: Validate frontmatter against a specific schema.

subcommands.execute-phase: Init execution state for a phase.
subcommands.plan-phase: Init planning state for a phase.
subcommands.resume: Restore context from a paused session.

tools_usage:
Commands: state, resolve-model, find-phase, commit, verify-summary, generate-slug,
current-timestamp, list-todos, verify-path-exists, config-ensure-section, config-set,
config-get, history-digest, phases, roadmap, requirements, phase, milestone,
validate, progress, todo, scaffold, phase-plan-index, state-snapshot, summary-extract,
websearch, frontmatter, verify, template, init
Run with gsd:help command args for detailed usage of each command.
